heading: Returns
body:
The signature of the input, in the format specified by
`output_format`.

The following function generates a sha256 signature as a
base 64 string:

**Input:**

```javascript
exports = function() {
  const signature = utils.crypto.hmac(
    "hello!",
    "super-secret",
    "sha256",
    "base64"
  )
  return signature
}
```

**Output:**

```json
"SUXd6PRMaTXXgBGaGsIHzaDWgTSa6C3D44lRGrvRak0="
```
